activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Material UI can render a same-day dispatch review surface, but the decision content remains limited to the raw repair visit brief.

surface.heading: Dispatch review
surface.status: V-2187 needs site access before assignment

selected.request: Kitchen freezer repair needs dispatch before the service window closes.

info.label: Technician
info.value: Reyes, 18 minutes from site and certified for the freezer unit

info.label: Parts readiness
info.value: Replacement fan motor available at the west depot

evidence: Technician Reyes is 18 minutes from the site and certified for the freezer unit.
Replacement fan motor is available at the west depot.
Customer gate code is missing before dispatch.
surface.policy: Same-day SLA repair visits can be assigned when parts readiness and site access are confirmed; missing access details return to dispatch support.
actions: Request the customer gate code from dispatch support.
Hold assignment until site access is confirmed.
Assign Technician Reyes after access is confirmed.
Escalate for SLA risk if access cannot be confirmed in time.

handoff.title: Site access needed before dispatch
handoff.reason: Technician Reyes is qualified and the fan motor is ready, but the missing gate code blocks same-day assignment.
handoff.action: Confirm the gate code, then release V-2187 to Technician Reyes within the SLA window.
